name: Dr. Sagar Patel
degree: Fellowship in Neonatology (I.A.P.), Pediatric Critical Care (Mumbai)
description: Dr. Sagar Patel has years of comprehensive clinical pediatric experience, specializing in advanced neonatal critical care and respiratory support structures.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Clinical Experience","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h3"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"During Residency in VS Hospital, Ahmedabad gained experience in handling a variety of Pediatric and Neonatal emergencies, led a team of Residents during the final year, was given the opportunity of decision making in the line of management and treatment of the admitted patients.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Worked for a period of 12 months in the 54 bedded tertiary care NICU, during the 3 years of Residency. Had a hands-on experience in the management of extreme preterm neonates and their complications.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Experience in Pediatric and Neonatal procedures such as pleural tap, abdominal tap, lumbar tap, peritoneal dialysis, bone marrow aspiration, insertion of peripheral and central lines, liver biopsy, intubation, cardio-pulmonary resuscitation, exchange transfusions, umbilical catheterization.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"After completion of my Pediatric Residency in May 2014, I joined LG Hospital c/o AMC medical college, Ahmedabad, Gujarat as a Senior Registrar in June 2014, for a period of two months. During this period I got the opportunity to look after all patients admitted to the ward as well as 30 bedded tertiary level neonatal and pediatric ICU.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Served as an Associate Pediatrician and Neonatologist in Sparsh Neonatal and Pediatric Centre, 22 bedded hospital with 5 bedded PICU and 8 bedded NICU, and Kamal Hospital, with 22 bedded NICU.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"IAP Neonatology Fellow at Bai Jerbai Wadia Hospital for Children, Mumbai, under the guidance of Dr. Sudha Rao for 12 months. During my fellowship, I worked in 100 bedded NICU with an Intramural and extramural facility. I managed highly premature babies, RDS, PDA, Sepsis, MODS, AOP, IVH, Neonatal Jaundice, Complex congenital heart diseases, another congenital anomaly like skeletal, neurological, hepatobiliary, etc., MAS, PPHN, Inborn error of Metabolism, ARF, Metabolic disorders, Tubular disorder, Shock, Seizures, DSD, an endocrine disorder, hematological disorders, BPD, CLD. Also worked in 12 bedded Surgical NICU and managed cases like CDH, TEF, Biliary atresia, Intestinal obstruction, atresia, ARM, Hirschsprung disease, PDA, Hydrocephalus, airway anomaly, tracheostomy, Intra-abdominal masses. We also followed up with all high-risk newborns in High-Risk follow-up OPD twice a week. Academic activity thrice a week, including Seminars, Case presentations and Journal clubs, grand rounds weekly, monthly statistical analysis, and mortality assessment meet.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Senior Registrar in PICU at Bai Jerbai Wadia Hospital for Children, Mumbai, under the guidance of Dr. Uma Ali for 6 months. During this period I worked in 12 bedded PICUs including 6 bedded SICUs. Managed cases like shock, raised ICP, Acute liver failure, ARF, CCF, Status epilepticus, status asthmatics, Sepsis, ARDS, Pneumonia, Dengue, DIC, febrile neutropenia, etc. and in SICU all complicated post-operative patients of pediatric surgery, pediatric orthopedics, pediatric neurosurgery, pediatric spine surgery, ENT surgery, plastic surgery and burns, post-renal transplant, pediatric ophthalmic surgery.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Nirav Patel
description: Dr. Nirav Patel is dedicated to exceptional newborn care, special handling for high-risk neonates, and continuous developmental therapy monitoring.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Clinical Experience","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr. Nirav during his residency period at prestigious Kasturba Medical College & Hospital, Manipal, Karnataka gained knowledge in handling a variety of Pediatric and Neonatal cases. Got the opportunity to lead a team of Residents during the final year, was given the opportunity to decision making in the line of management and of the critical patients under the guidance of expert Pediatric Professors.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"As KMC Manipal is one of the best tertiary care referral centers with level III NICU and PICU in south India, during the Residency period got hands-on experience in the management of Extreme preterm neonates and critically ill children.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"center","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"center","indent":0,"type":"quote","version":1},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Academic activity with clinical skills has been always a key characteristic of South Indian Institutions like KMC Manipal. He was used to attending and presenting various topics in Seminars like Clinical Case discussions, Journal clubs, monthly statistical analysis, and mortality assessment.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"KMC Manipal infrastructure had 6 PICU beds along with 6 bedded SICU where he managed cases such as Shock, Raised ICP, Acute liver failure, ARF, CCF, Status epilepticus, Status asthmatics, ARDS, Pneumonia, Sepsis, Dengue, DIC, and Febrile neutropenia. In SICU he was managing complicated patients referred from various departments such as pediatric surgery, pediatric orthopedics, pediatric neurosurgery, pediatric spine surgery, ENT surgery, plastic surgery- burns, post-renal transplant, and pediatric ophthalmic surgery.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"In the highly equipped NICU and PICU of KMC Manipal he had the opportunity to learn various types of non-invasive ventilation like CPAP, HHHFNC, and BiPAP along with Conventional ventilation and HFO ventilation with Inhaled Nitric Oxide (INO).","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He managed chemotherapy patients who were treated under experienced professors like Dr. Pushpa Kini & Dr. Nalini Bhaskarananda. Under their guidance, he had the opportunity to treat patients with pediatric cancer.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He joined National Neonatology Forum Fellowship Programme in 2017, as a Senior Registrar and fellow. During this period, he got the opportunity to look after 18 bedded tertiary level neonatal ICU. He has managed extremely premature babies (weight less than 1000 grams) with RDS, HsPDA, Sepsis, MODS, AOP, IVH, Neonatal hyperbilirubinemia with Exchange transfusion, Complex congenital heart diseases, and various Congenital anomalies of skeletal, neurological, hepatobiliary systems.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He got immense experience to manage the cases like severe MAS, PPHN, Inborn error of metabolism, ARF, Metabolic disorders, Tubular disorder, Shock, Seizures, DSD, Endocrine disorder, Hematological disorders, New and Old BPD, CLD. Also treated the cases like CDH, TEF, Biliary atresia, Intestinal obstruction, Intestinal atresia, ARM, Hirschsprung disease, Hydrocephalus, Airway anomaly, Tracheostomy, Intra-abdominal masses.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He has presented oral and poster papers in various International, National, and State conferences and CMEs.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"GrAPH","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h1"},{"children":[{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr. Nirav Patel is the youngest director at Orange Neonatal & Pediatric Intensive Care Unit, Chandkheda, Ahmedabad. He believes in teamwork, as ","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":1,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"“Great things are not done by impulse, but by a series of small things brought together”.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He is interested in socializing by helping many NGOs for social causes for underprivileged children. He started gaining experience as a team leader since his old school days which makes him an efficient counselor.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"  When he is not on duty, he loves going for long drives, playing piano, writing poems &amp, cycling.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Sunil Patel
description: Dr. Sunil Patel specializes in critical child health diagnostics and comprehensive neonatal intensive care, ensuring safe outcomes for high-risk babies.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Clinical Experience","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"2009-2011 Sterling hospital","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":1},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"2009-2013 Synergy Hospital, Maninagar","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":2}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"list","version":1,"listType":"number","start":1,"tag":"ol"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Social Service","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Vice Prescient- Save Humanity","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":1},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Have been to many clinical lectures & academic activities","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":2},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Actively Participated in Many NGO activities like Girl Education, Health Awareness & Help in Community","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":3}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"list","version":1,"listType":"number","start":1,"tag":"ol"}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Maulik Patel
description: Dr. Maulik Patel is a dedicated pediatrician and intensivist, providing specialist clinical support in managing complex neonatal and pediatric intensive care cases.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr. Maulik Patel is one of the important pillars of Orange Neonatal & Pediatric Intensive care unit. Being one of the prime partners of Orange hospital he is also an accurate decision maker towards the growth of the Hospital.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Completed his MBBS & MD Pediatrics, over the years with the gained knowledge and perspective he developed his skills to rule over every type of emergency situations for children.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"By managing critically ill-patients and complicated patients referred from various departments such as pediatric surgery, pediatric orthopedics, pediatric neurosurgery, pediatric spine surgery, ENT surgery, plastic surgery- burns, post-renal transplant, and pediatric ophthalmic surgery.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"His quick response as the domain demands were many a times life saving moments for the children.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Tejas Shah
degree: M.D. Pediatrics, Pediatric Intensive Care Medicine (UK), Fellowship in Pediatric Bronchoscopy (USA)
description: Dr. Tejas Shah is a highly distinguished intensivist with specialized international fellowships in pediatric critical care and advanced bronchoscopy.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Clinical Experience","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr. Tejas Shah has vast experience in the field of Pediatric Intensive Care over the last 11 years, having worked at Prestigious institutes like Evelina Children’s Hospital (London), Birmingham Children’s Hospital (Birmingham, UK), Queen’s Medical Centre (Nottingham, UK) and University Hospital of Wales (Cardiff, UK).","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He has gained tremendous hands-on experience in the transport of sick children, having worked with South Thames Retrieval Service and Embrace Transport service, UK.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"center","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"center","indent":0,"type":"quote","version":1},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Following his relocation, he has worked as a Consultant Pediatric Intensivist at Apollo Hospitals, CIMS Hospital, and Zydus Hospital, Ahmedabad.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Since 2012, he has been instrumental in starting and developing stand-alone Cyril Children Hospital with a team of qualified Intensivists, Neonatologists, and Pediatricians at Naranpura, Ahmedabad.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He is one of the senior Pediatric intensivists in Ahmedabad city.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He has given lectures, case-presentations and participated in various national and regional conferences as invited faculty in the field of Pediatric Intensive Care.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr. Tejas Shah is one of the faculty for the Pediatric Mechanical Ventilation workshop being held annually at Ahmedabad (successfully completed 2 annual workshops)","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Divyesh Sadadiwala
description: Dr. Divyesh Sadadiwala is a highly specialized pediatric cardiologist, dedicated to diagnosing and treating heart conditions in infants, children, and young adults.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Clinical Experience","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr. Divyesh has a rich experience of 10 years in the field of pediatric cardiology.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Treated thousands of patients with congenital and acquired heart diseases, arrhythmias, and grown-ups with CHD.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He is attached to CIMS hospital as a consultant pediatric cardiologist for the last 7 years now.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Education","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He completed his graduation and post-graduation with a gold medal from Govt. Medical college, Surat.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Did fellowship Program in pediatric cardiology from Apex Cardiac Institute Narayana Hrudayalaya, Bangalore.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Vaibhav Shah
description: Dr. Vaibhav Shah is a leading pediatric hemato-oncologist, specializing in the diagnosis and comprehensive treatment of blood disorders and pediatric cancers.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr. Vaibhav Shah has been working in the field of pediatric hematology & oncology since 2017. He has his expertise in managing pediatric cancer like blood, kidney, liver, eye, and other blood disorders like thalassemia. ","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Ha is also involved in the management of pediatric bone marrow transplantation with very promising outcomes along with therapeutic services like chemotherapy, Intrathecal injection, or blood transfusions.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Urvish Parikh
degree: M.Ch in Pediatric Surgery & M.S in General Surgery
description: Dr. Urvish Parikh is an expert pediatric surgeon with advanced training in performing complex medico-surgical operations for neonates and young children.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr Urvish Parikh is a well-known Pediatric surgeon in Ahmedabad and has massive experience of more than 3000 pediatric surgeries. His constant dedication and commitment to serving his patients could be seen anytime in Orange Hospital. The support he provided to the Hospital made him an integral part since the last 10 years. A strong foothold to deliver 100 % results in complicated cases like congenital anomalies like TOF, CDH, Imperforated Anus, Acute Intestinal Perforation, and Intussusception is owned by Dr. Parikh in Orange hospital.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He also has a fine hand in daycare surgeries like Umbilical hernia, Inguinal hernia, Circumcision, and Hypospadiasis. An aseptic and quick surgical hand is his best characteristic.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Harsh Patel
description: Dr. Harsh Patel specializes in pediatric neurology, providing expert evaluation and treatments for pediatric neuromuscular disorders, epilepsy, and developmental delays.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr Harsh Patel heads the Pediatric Neurology department of Orange Hospital. His extensive knowledge of 6 years in the field made him a domain expert in handling any and every type of severe Pediatric Neurology case. He is the first DM qualified health professional in the subspecialty of Pediatric Neurology in Gujarat. He is also a visiting consultant in various well-known Healthcare institutions like ANSA Clinic.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He has been linked with Orange Neonatal and Pediatric Intensive care unit since last 6 years, treating every minor to major pediatric neurology cases.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Specialized interest","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Drug resistant childhood epilepsy,","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":1},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Autoimmune CNS disorders","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":2},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Childhood neuromuscular disorders","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":3}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"list","version":1,"listType":"bullet","start":1,"tag":"ul"}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Ruchi Shah
description: Dr. Ruchi Shah is an experienced pediatric endocrinologist, specializing in the management of juvenile diabetes, growth disorders, and thyroid issues in kids.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr Ruchi Shah did her M.B.B.S. and M.D.(Pediatrics) from Smt. N.H.L.M.M.C. in 2013 with a gold medal. After this, she did her fellowship at Bai Jerbai Wadia Hospital for Children, Parel, Mumbai in Pediatric Endocrinology.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Her extensive knowledge in the field of Pediatric Endocrinology helped in treating various the children in various emergence situation.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"During her training period, she was involved in taking care of indoor and outdoor pediatric and neonatal patients with endocrine disorders, various procedures, post graduate teaching and academic activities as well.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Experience","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"heading","version":1,"tag":"h2"},{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Consultant Pediatric Endocrinologist at Endokids Clinic, Ahmedabad (Present)","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":1},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Fellowship at Bai Jerbai Wadia Hospital for Children, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. ( August, 2013 to August 2014 )","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":2},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Residency Training at Sheth V.S.General Hospital, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. ( May,2010 to April, 2013. )","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"listitem","version":1,"value":3}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"list","version":1,"listType":"bullet","start":1,"tag":"ul"}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Maulik Patel (Ortho)
description: Dr. Maulik Patel is a dedicated pediatric orthopedician, specializing in treating pediatric bone fractures, joint deformities, and congenital skeletal issues.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"MBBS, D.Ortho, DNB (Ortho) Consultant Pediatric Orthopedic Surgeon Fellowship in Pediatric and Adolescent hip disorder, NUH Singapore Fellowship M Pediatric Orthopedics, Wadia Children’s Hospital, Mumbai Specialist Registrar, Pediatric Orthopedics, BIRRO Hospital, Andhra Pradesh","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Dr.Maulik Patel developed special inclination towards Pediatric Orthopedics and Cerebral Palsy as a postgraduate while treating the same at M.S.Ramaiah Medical College, Bangalore, KA.After his post graduation, he joined Balaji Institute of Surgery,Research & Rehabilitation for Disabled, Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh as a specialist in Pediatric Orthopedics. BIRRD is Pediatric Orthopedic Hospital & tertiary centre for Cerebral Palsy, Complex Pediatric Orthopedic problems and Post Polio Residual Paralysis Deformities.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"He obtained his Fellowship in Pediatric Orthopedics from Jer Bai Wadia Children’s Hospital, Mumbai, MH.Jer Bai Wadia Children’s Hospital is the most premier Institute in India.Looking at his good work & Research Papers, he was Awarded Advanced Fellowship in Pediatric & Adolescent Hip Disorders from National University Hospital, Singapore, which is one of the most advanced centres across the globe. He practiced there for honing his Clinical & Surgical Skills to the latest available regime.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"With his more than 5 years experience in Pediatric Orthopedics, he has been managing Club Foot, Cerebral Palsy & Neuromuscular Disorders, Pediatric & Adolescent Hip Disorders, Metabolic Bone Disorders, Articular Infections, Limb Lengthening & Reconstruction, Deformity Correction & Osteogenesis Imperfecta, Obstetric Brachial Plexus Palsy, Pediatric Sports Injuries.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}

name: Dr. Kinisha Patel
degree: MD, DNB (Pediatrics), Fellowship in Pediatric Gastroenterology
description: Dr. Kinisha Patel is a highly skilled pediatric gastroenterologist, offering expert care in digestive system disorders and nutrition management in children.
content: {"root":{"children":[{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"When the critically ill patients of Gastroenterology, hepatology and liver problems visit Orange Neonatal & Pediatric intensive care unit, we make sure they get the upright treatment from the expert itself in the field. Dr. Kinisha Patel is a well-known Pediatric Gastroenterologist completed her graduation from Davangere, Karnataka & MD from D.Y Patil Medical college, Pune.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"She is a medical practitioner and researcher, who has studied WHO boPV. Has done various research on Pneumococcal conjugate vaccine, Rotavirus Vaccine phase III trial, Quadrivalent Influenza vaccine phase III trial, Pentavalent bridging study as a co-investigator.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""},{"children":[{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"As a sub investigator – Multicenter, double blinded, randomized, placebo – controlled trial of Arimoclomal in patients diagnosed with Gaucher disease type 1 or 3.","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"Currently working as a Pediatric Gastroenterologist, Hepatologist, Liver Transplant Physician","type":"text","version":1},{"type":"linebreak","version":1},{"detail":0,"format":0,"mode":"normal","style":"","text":"in Orange Neonatal & Pediatric Intensive care unit.","type":"text","version":1}],"direction":null,"format":"start","indent":0,"type":"paragraph","version":1,"textFormat":0,"textStyle":""}],"direction":null,"format":"","indent":0,"type":"root","version":1}}
